nodes.label: AuthService
nodes.summary: Owns login, token issue, token refresh, and account lock decisions.
facts: AuthService validates credentials through CredentialVerifier before issuing tokens.
AuthService calls TokenIssuer to create access and refresh tokens.
AuthService records failed attempts through AuditLog.

nodes.label: CredentialVerifier
nodes.summary: Checks password hashes and account state before login succeeds.
facts: CredentialVerifier reads password hashes from UserStore.
CredentialVerifier refuses login when LockoutPolicy marks the account locked.

nodes.label: UserStore
nodes.summary: Stores user profiles, password hashes, roles, and lockout counters.
facts: UserStore persists failed_login_count and locked_until.
UserStore exposes role membership to PermissionService.

nodes.label: TokenIssuer
nodes.summary: Creates signed JWT access tokens and opaque refresh tokens.
facts: TokenIssuer signs access tokens with SigningKeyRing.
TokenIssuer stores refresh-token fingerprints in SessionStore.
TokenIssuer includes role claims supplied by PermissionService.

nodes.label: SigningKeyRing
nodes.summary: Manages active and retired token signing keys.
facts: SigningKeyRing rotates keys every 30 days.
SigningKeyRing keeps retired keys for 14 days to validate existing tokens.

nodes.label: SessionStore
nodes.summary: Stores refresh token fingerprints, device metadata, and revocation state.
facts: SessionStore revokes all sessions for a user after password reset.
SessionStore stores only token fingerprints, not raw refresh tokens.

nodes.label: PermissionService
nodes.summary: Maps users and roles to allowed operations.
facts: PermissionService reads role membership from UserStore.
PermissionService sends role claims to TokenIssuer.
PermissionService blocks AdminPanel actions unless the user has admin role.

nodes.label: AdminPanel
nodes.summary: Internal UI for user management, lockout overrides, and forced password resets.
facts: AdminPanel calls PermissionService before privileged actions.
AdminPanel can clear locked_until through UserStore.
AdminPanel can trigger password reset, which revokes sessions.

nodes.label: LockoutPolicy
nodes.summary: Locks accounts after repeated failed login attempts.
facts: LockoutPolicy locks an account after 5 failed attempts in 10 minutes.
LockoutPolicy stores lock state in UserStore.
AuditLog receives lockout events for compliance review.

nodes.label: AuditLog
nodes.summary: Append-only event log for authentication, authorization, and admin actions.
facts: AuditLog records login failures and lockout events.
AuditLog records AdminPanel privileged actions.
AuditLog entries are retained for 400 days.

nodes.label: PasswordResetFlow
nodes.summary: Lets users reset passwords through signed email links.
facts: PasswordResetFlow updates password hashes in UserStore.
PasswordResetFlow revokes sessions in SessionStore after password change.
PasswordResetFlow emits AuditLog events.

nodes.label: EmailLinkSigner
nodes.summary: Signs and validates short-lived password reset links.
facts: EmailLinkSigner uses SigningKeyRing for reset-link signatures.
EmailLinkSigner reset links expire after 20 minutes.
